verse_text: And I shall bring a sword upon the land and upon the mountains, and upon the grain and upon the wine and upon the oil, and upon whatever the ground brings forth, and on men and livestock, and on all the labor of their hands.'

pericope.title: The Command to Rebuild the Lord's House

links.context: The temple will be rebuilt, but not as it was before. The second temple, not as glorious, was completed in approximately 515 BC (see [[HAG.1:1]]-15).
